description.en: Master named groups, lookahead/lookbehind assertions, re.sub for substitution, and compiled patterns for performance.
description.ta: named groups, lookahead/lookbehind assertions, re.sub рооро╛ро▒рпНро▒рпАроЯрпБ, compiled patterns роЖроХро┐ропро╡ро▒рпНро▒ро┐ро▓рпН родрпЗро░рпНроЪрпНроЪро┐ рокрпЖро▒рпБроЩрпНроХро│рпН.

story_variants.en:
## Vaathiyaar's Advanced Decoder

Vaathiyaar upgrades the magnifying glass to a high-tech scanner. "Basic regex finds patterns. Advanced regex **transforms** text, **extracts** structured data, and handles edge cases with lookahead and lookbehind."

### Advanced Features

| Feature | Syntax | Purpose |
|---------|--------|----------|
| Named Group | `(?P<name>...)` | Label captured groups |
| Lookahead | `(?=...)` | Match only if followed by |
| Lookbehind | `(?<=...)` | Match only if preceded by |
| Non-capturing | `(?:...)` | Group without capturing |
| `re.sub` | `re.sub(pattern, repl, text)` | Find and replace |
| `re.compile` | `re.compile(pattern)` | Pre-compile for speed |

### Named Groups

```python
pattern = r'(?P<year>\d{4})-(?P<month>\d{2})-(?P<day>\d{2})'
match = re.search(pattern, '2025-03-27')
print(match.group('year'))  # 2025
```

> **Key Concept:** Named groups make your regex self-documenting. Instead of `match.group(1)`, use `match.group('year')` тАФ much clearer for maintenance.

## р░╡р░╛р░ер░┐р░пр░╛р░░р▒Н р░пр▒Кр░Хр▒Нр░Х р░Ер░зр▒Бр░ир░╛р░др░и р░бр▒Ар░Хр▒Лр░бр░░р▒Н

```python
pattern = r'(?P<year>\d{4})-(?P<month>\d{2})-(?P<day>\d{2})'

print(match.group('year'))  # 2025
```

> ** р░Хр▒А р░нр░╛р░╡р░ир░Г** р░кр▒Зр░░р▒Бр░др▒Л р░Хр▒Вр░бр░┐р░и р░╕р░ор▒Вр░╣р░╛р░▓р▒Б р░ор▒А р░░р▒Жр░Ьр░┐р░Хр▒Нр░╕р▒Нр░ир▒Б р░╕р▒Нр░╡р▒Ар░п-р░кр░др▒Нр░░р▒Ар░Хр░░р░┐р░Вр░Ър░бр░╛р░ир░┐р░Хр░┐ р░╕р░╣р░╛р░пр░кр░бр░др░╛р░пр░┐. `match.group(1) `р░Хр░╛р░Хр▒Бр░Вр░бр░╛, р░ир░┐р░░р▒Нр░╡р░╣р░г р░Хр▒Лр░╕р░В`match.group('year') `  р░ир▒Б р░Йр░кр░пр▒Лр░Чр░┐р░Вр░Ър░Вр░бр░┐.

"р┤Ер┤Яр┤┐р┤╕р╡Нр┤ер┤╛р┤и р┤░р╡Жр┤Ьр╡Жр┤Хр╡Нр┤╕р╡Н р┤кр┤╛р┤▒р╡Нр┤▒р╡Зр┤гр╡Бр┤Хр╡╛ р┤Хр┤гр╡Нр┤Яр╡Жр┤др╡Нр┤др╡Бр┤ир╡Нр┤ир╡Б. р┤╡р┤┐р┤кр╡Бр┤▓р┤ор┤╛р┤п р┤░р╡Жр┤Ьр╡Жр┤Хр╡Нр┤╕р╡Н **р┤кр┤░р┤┐р┤╡р╡╝р┤др╡Нр┤др┤ир┤В р┤Ър╡Жр┤пр╡Нр┤пр╡Бр┤ир╡Нр┤ир╡Б** р┤Яр╡Жр┤Хр╡Нр┤╕р╡Нр┤▒р╡Нр┤▒р╡Н,** р┤Шр┤Яр┤ир┤╛р┤кр┤░р┤ор┤╛р┤п р┤бр┤╛р┤▒р╡Нр┤▒ р┤Ор┤Хр╡Нр┤╕р╡Нр┤Яр╡Нр┤░р┤╛р┤Хр╡Нр┤▒р╡Нр┤▒р╡Н р┤Ър╡Жр┤пр╡Нр┤пр╡Бр┤ир╡Нр┤ир╡Б**, р┤Тр┤кр╡Нр┤кр┤В р┤ир╡Лр┤Хр╡Нр┤Хр╡Бр┤Хр╡Вр┤Яр╡Нр┤Яр┤▓р╡Бр┤В р┤кр┤┐р┤ир╡Нр┤ир┤┐р┤▓р╡Бр┤ор╡Бр┤│р╡Нр┤│ р┤ир╡Лр┤Хр╡Нр┤Хр╡Бр┤Хр╡Вр┤Яр╡Нр┤Яр┤▓р╡Бр┤Хр┤│р╡Бр┤В р┤Йр┤кр┤пр╡Лр┤Чр┤┐р┤Ър╡Нр┤Ър╡Н р┤Хр┤╡р┤┐р┤Юр╡Нр┤Юр╡Бр┤│р╡Нр┤│ р┤Хр╡Зр┤╕р╡Бр┤Хр╡╛ р┤Хр╡Ир┤Хр┤╛р┤░р╡Нр┤пр┤В р┤Ър╡Жр┤пр╡Нр┤пр╡Бр┤ир╡Нр┤ир╡Б. ### р┤кр╡Зр┤░р╡Бр┤│р╡Нр┤│ р┤Чр╡Нр┤░р╡Вр┤кр╡Нр┤кр╡Бр┤Хр╡╛

```python
pattern = r'(?P<year>\d{4})-(?P<month>\d{2})-(?P<day>\d{2})'
match = re.search(pattern, '2025-03-27')
print(match.group('year'))  # 2025
```

> **р┤Ер┤Яр┤┐р┤╕р╡Нр┤ер┤╛р┤и р┤Жр┤╢р┤пр┤В:** р┤кр╡Зр┤░р╡Бр┤│р╡Нр┤│ р┤Чр╡Нр┤░р╡Вр┤кр╡Нр┤кр╡Бр┤Хр╡╛ р┤ир┤┐р┤Щр╡Нр┤Щр┤│р╡Бр┤Яр╡Ж р┤▒р╡Жр┤Ьр╡Жр┤Хр╡Нр┤╕р╡Н р┤╕р╡Нр┤╡р┤пр┤В р┤░р╡Зр┤Цр┤кр╡Нр┤кр╡Жр┤Яр╡Бр┤др╡Нр┤др╡Бр┤ир╡Нр┤ир╡Б. `match.group(1) `р┤Ор┤ир╡Нр┤ир┤др┤┐р┤ир╡Б р┤кр┤Хр┤░р┤В`match.group('year') `  р┤Йр┤кр┤пр╡Лр┤Чр┤┐р┤Хр╡Нр┤Хр╡Бр┤Х.
story_variants.fr:
## Le d├йcodeur avanc├й de Vaathiyaar

Vaathiyaar met ├а jour la loupe vers un scanner de haute technologie. "Le regex de base trouve des motifs.Le regex avanc├й transforme le texte, extrait les donn├йes structur├йes et g├иre les cas de bord avec un regard et un regard arri├иre".

### Des fonctionnalit├йs avanc├йes

Je suis un homme qui a des probl├иmes avec la musique.
|---------|--------|----------|
Je suis un homme qui a ├йt├й captur├й.
Je suis un homme qui a une bonne id├йe.
Je suis un homme qui a une vieille exp├йrience.
Je ne sais pas si tu veux me faire une id├йe.
Je suis un homme qui a des probl├иmes avec les autres.
Je suis en train de faire une compilation pour la vitesse.

### Groups nomm├йs

```python
pattern = r'(?P<year>\d{4})-(?P<month>\d{2})-(?P<day>\d{2})'
match = re.search(pattern, '2025-03-27')
print(match.group('year'))  # 2025
```

> **Concept cl├й:** Les groupes nomm├йs rendent votre regex autodocument├й. Au lieu de `match.group(1)`, utilisez `match.group('year') `  beaucoup plus clair pour la maintenance.
story_variants.es:
## El decodificador avanzado de Vaathiyaar

Vaathiyaar actualiza la lupa a un esc├бner de alta tecnolog├нa. "El regex b├бsico encuentra patrones. el regex avanzado transforma texto, extrae datos estructurados y maneja los casos de borde con mirador y mirador".

### Caracter├нsticas avanzadas

 Caracter├нsticas  Sintasa  Prop├│sito 
|---------|--------|----------|
тЩм Grupo llamado тЩм тЩм тЩм P тЩм nombre тЩм тЩм тЩм etiqueta capturado grupos тЩм
# Mira hacia arriba # # s├│lo coincide si es seguido por #
# Mira atr├бs # # ┬┐No se ajusta m├бs que si est├б precedido por #
тЩк No capturar тЩк тЩк ┬┐Grupo sin capturar тЩк
тЩк son. sub. тЩк тЩк son. sub. тЩк patr├│n, replica, texto тЩк тЩк encontrar y reemplazar тЩк
# Conclusi├│n de la velocidad #

### Grupos denominados

```python
pattern = r'(?P<year>\d{4})-(?P<month>\d{2})-(?P<day>\d{2})'
match = re.search(pattern, '2025-03-27')
print(match.group('year'))  # 2025
```

> **Concepto clave:** Los grupos denominados hacen que su regex se auto-documente. en lugar de `match.group(1)`, utilice `match.group('year') `  mucho m├бs claro para el mantenimiento.

explanation.en: A sample log line with date, level, and IP
Named groups label each captured part
Search for the pattern in the log
Access by NAME instead of number тАФ much clearer
Get ALL named groups as a dictionary
LOOKAHEAD: find words followed by ' $' тАФ but don't include ' $'
LOOKBEHIND: find numbers preceded by $ тАФ but don't include $
re.sub replaces ALL matches with the replacement string
'Call XXX-XXXX or XXX-XXXX' тАФ phone numbers censored!
Compile pattern ONCE for reuse тАФ faster for repeated use
Use the compiled pattern's methods directly

animation_sequence.code:
import re

log = '2025-03-27 ERROR: Connection timeout'
pattern = r'(?P<date>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}) (?P<level>\w+):'
m = re.search(pattern, log)
print(m.group('date'))
print(m.group('level'))

text = 'Call 555-1234 or 800-5678'
censored = re.sub(r'\d{3}-\d{4}', 'XXX-XXXX', text)
print(censored)

executionSteps.description: A log line to parse with named groups
Search finds the pattern in the log
Access by group name 'date' instead of index
Access 'level' group - much clearer than group(2)
re.sub finds and replaces ALL matches

instruction.en: Use re.sub with a function to convert all prices like $XX.XX to euros by multiplying by 0.92. E.g., '$10.00' becomes 'EUR 9.20'.

instruction.te: $XX.XX р░╡р░Вр░Яр░┐ р░Ер░ир▒Нр░ир░┐ р░зр░░р░▓р░ир▒Б р░пр▒Вр░░р▒Лр░▓р░Хр▒Б р░ор░╛р░░р▒Нр░Ър░бр░╛р░ир░┐р░Хр░┐ р░Тр░Х р░лр░Вр░Хр▒Нр░╖р░ир▒Нр░др▒Л re.sub р░ир▒Б р░Йр░кр░пр▒Лр░Чр░┐р░Вр░Ър░Вр░бр░┐.
instruction.ml: $XX.XX р┤кр╡Лр┤▓р╡Бр┤│р╡Нр┤│ р┤Ор┤▓р╡Нр┤▓р┤╛ р┤╡р┤┐р┤▓р┤Хр┤│р╡Бр┤В 0.92 р┤Хр╡Кр┤гр╡Нр┤Яр╡Н р┤Чр╡Бр┤гр┤┐р┤Ър╡Нр┤Ър╡Бр┤Хр╡Кр┤гр╡Нр┤Яр╡Н р┤пр╡Вр┤▒р╡Лр┤пр┤┐р┤▓р╡Зр┤Хр╡Нр┤Хр╡Н р┤кр┤░р┤┐р┤╡р╡╝р┤др╡Нр┤др┤ир┤В р┤Ър╡Жр┤пр╡Нр┤пр╡Бр┤ир╡Нр┤ир┤др┤┐р┤ир╡Бр┤│р╡Нр┤│ р┤Тр┤░р╡Б р┤лр┤Вр┤Чр╡Нр┤╖р┤ир╡Бр┤│р╡Нр┤│ re.sub р┤Йр┤кр┤пр╡Лр┤Чр┤┐р┤Хр╡Нр┤Хр╡Бр┤Х. р┤Йр┤жр┤╛р┤╣р┤░р┤гр┤др╡Нр┤др┤┐р┤ир╡Н, '$10.00' 'EUR9.20' р┤Жр┤пр┤┐ р┤ор┤╛р┤▒р╡Бр┤ир╡Нр┤ир╡Б.
instruction.fr: Utilisez re.sub avec une fonction pour convertir tous les prix comme $XX.XX en euros en multipliant par 0,92.
instruction.es: Utilice re.sub con una funci├│n para convertir todos los precios como $XX.XX a euros multiplicando por 0,92. Por ejemplo, '$10.00' se convierte en 'EUR9.20'.
instruction.it: Utilizzare re.sub con funzione per convertire tutti i prezzi come $XX.XX in euro moltiplicando per 0,92.
instruction.ko: re.subые╝ ьВмьЪйэХШьЧм $XX.XXьЩА ъ░ЩьЭА ыкиыУа ъ░Аъ▓йьЭД 0.92ыбЬ ъ│▒эХШьЧм ьЬаыбЬыбЬ ы│АэЩШэХйыЛИыЛд. ьШИые╝ ыУдьЦ┤, '$10.00'ыКФ 'EUR9.20'ыбЬыРйыЛИыЛд.

practice_challenges.starter_code:
import re

def to_euros(match):
    usd = float(match.group(1))
    eur = usd * 0.92
    return f'EUR {eur:.2f}'

text = 'Laptop $999.99, Mouse $29.99, Keyboard $79.99'
result = re.sub(r'\$(\d+\.\d{2})', to_euros, text)
print(result)
practice_challenges.expected_output: Laptop EUR 919.99, Mouse EUR 27.59, Keyboard EUR 73.59

en: re.sub can take a function as the replacement
The function receives a Match object
Use match.group(1) to get the captured price
Convert to float, multiply by 0.92, format with :.2f
Creates a named capture group called 'name'
Matches only if followed by the pattern, but doesn't include it
Matches only if preceded by the pattern
ta: pattern родрпКроЯро░рпНроирпНродро╛ро▓рпН роороЯрпНроЯрпБроорпН рокрпКро░рпБродрпНродрпБроХро┐ро▒родрпБ, роЖройро╛ро▓рпН роЙро│рпНро│роЯроХрпНроХро╛родрпБ

q.en: What is the advantage of re.compile()?

en: Pre-compiles pattern for faster repeated use
